Build Date:  2026-02-25
Status:      ✅ PRODUCTION READY
Package:     83 KB compressed

📦 DEPLOYMENT PACKAGE

Location:
  ~/dev/openclawmasters_agents/squadrons/sephirot-oc/dist/

Files:
  ✓ sephirot-oc-squadron-v1.0.0.tar.gz    (83 KB)
  ✓ CHECKSUMS.txt                         (SHA256)
  ✓ VERSION.txt
  ✓ DEPLOY_README.md                      (Full guide)
  ✓ QUICKSTART.md                         (Quick start)
  ✓ MANIFEST.txt                          (Package manifest)
  ✓ setup.sh                              (Setup script)
  ✓ deploy.sh                             (Deploy script)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚀 DEPLOYMENT OPTIONS

1. Local Deployment (This Machine):
   cd dist && ./deploy.sh localhost

2. Remote Deployment:
   cd dist && ./deploy.sh user@remote-server

3. Manual Deployment:
   tar -xzf dist/sephirot-oc-squadron-v1.0.0.tar.gz -C . --strip-components=1
   bash dist/setup.sh

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ TEST RESULTS

Pipeline Test (2026-02-25):
  ✓ Scan:    200 signals from 40 queries
  ✓ Filter:  168 passed (32 duplicates removed)
  ✓ Rank:    3 top + 10 watchlist
  ✓ Email:   Sent successfully
  ✓ LLM:     Executive summary generated

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🐛 BUGS FIXED

1. LLM Executive Summary
   - Added agents.llm import
   - New importlib system
   - Absolute project paths

2. Agent Import System
   - Fixed agents/ namespace collision
   - sys.modules loading

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📋 REQUIREMENTS

Required:
  - Python 3.9+
  - ~/dev/openclawmasters_agents/agents/llm.py
  - ~/.freejack-credentials.env (TAVILY_API_KEY)

Optional:
  - DEEPSEEK_API_KEY (LLM fallback)
  - ~/.openclaw/config/email_global.json (SMTP)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔐 INTEGRITY CHECK

SHA256 Checksum:
  6188c0846e1a6c991ecb31fee648515b26ddec584788e23eb1aebec60985eb97

Verify:
  shasum -a 256 sephirot-oc-squadron-v1.0.0.tar.gz

✨ READY FOR DEPLOYMENT

Choose your deployment method above and follow the prompts.

For remote deployment, ensure:
  - SSH access to target host
  - Python 3.9+ installed on target
  - Project root path exists on target

Questions? See DEPLOY_README.md or create support ticket.
